description.en: GCN provided a simple and effective layer for learning from graph structure and node features together. It became a standard baseline for semi-supervised node classification and graph representation learning.
description.zh: GCN 提供了一个简单有效的层，用于同时从图结构和节点特征中学习。它成为半监督节点分类和图表示学习的标准基线。

sourceName.zh: 托马斯·基普夫个人主页

review.imagePolicy: Do not use new remote images in production until source and license are verified.
nextSteps: Open sources.json and pages/ to verify primary facts.
Record accepted/rejected image candidates in notes.md.
Move approved assets into resources/images only after review.
